trades.reasoning: Top-ranked screener score (100) with the rare volume surge signal on top of full bullish alignment — RSI in momentum zone, MACD crossover, histogram rising, and price well above SMA-20; in a strong risk-on day this is the highest-confidence entry available.

decisions.briefing: Markets surged today in a broad risk-on rally — NASDAQ up 2.9% and S&P 500 up 1.9% — signalling strong institutional appetite for growth and tech names. With $619 in cash and 4 open slots, I deployed into XNDU, the only score-100 candidate on the screener and the sole ticker showing a volume surge alongside full momentum alignment. No existing positions triggered stop-loss or profit-target levels, so the rest of the portfolio rides the rally intact.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities staged a powerful broad-based rally on June 15, 2026, with the NASDAQ leading at +2.9% as investor risk appetite returned decisively. Technology and growth sectors drove the move, consistent with a rotation back into high-beta names after a period of consolidation. No specific macro shock was in play; the session reflected accumulation by institutional buyers seeing the medium-term trend as intact.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年6月15日，美國股市出現強勁全面反彈，納斯達克指數領漲2.9%，顯示投資者風險偏好明顯回升。科技與成長股板塊引領升勢，市場資金持續輪動回流高貝他值股票，反映機構投資者認為中線趨勢仍屬健康。整體而言，本次升市並非由單一宏觀催化劑驅動，而是資金主動尋找動能標的的體現。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume significantly exceeds its normal average — typically more than 1.5x the 20-day average. It signals that a large number of buyers (often institutions) are stepping in with conviction, which can accelerate a price move and validate a momentum signal. Combined with bullish RSI and MACD, a volume surge is one of the strongest short-term entry signals in technical analysis.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票的交易量明顯超過正常水平，通常高於20日平均成交量的1.5倍以上。這代表大量買家（往往是機構投資者）以高度確信的態度進場，有助於加速股價上漲並印證動能訊號的可靠性。若成交量激增同時配合RSI走強及MACD看漲交叉，則是技術分析中最具說服力的短線入市訊號之一。
